UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information within the application. Authentication details are managed externally by Firebase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

firebaseAuthId.description: Unique ID from the external Firebase Authentication system.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

darkModeEnabled.description: User's preference for dark mode UI.

Goal.title: Goal
Goal.description: Represents a personal goal set by a user, including details like deadlines, categories, and progress.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Goal entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity who owns this goal. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Goal)

title.description: A concise title for the goal.

description.description: A detailed description of the goal.

deadline.description: The target date for completing the goal.

priority.description: The priority level of the goal (e.g., "Low", "Medium", "High").

status.description: The current status of the goal (e.g., "ToDo", "InProgress", "Completed", "Archived").

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the goal was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the goal was last updated.

completionDate.description: The actual date when the goal was marked as completed.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a specific task associated with a user's goal, including time tracking and completion status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Task entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity who owns this task. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Task)

goalId.description: Reference to the Goal entity this task belongs to. (Relationship: Goal 1:N Task)

title.description: A concise title for the task.

description.description: A detailed description of the task.

estimatedTimeMinutes.description: The estimated time in minutes to complete the task.

actualTimeMinutes.description: The actual time in minutes spent on the task.

isCompleted.description: Indicates whether the task has been completed.

deadline.description: The target date for completing the task.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the task was marked as completed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the task was last updated.

tagIds.description: References to Tag entities associated with this task. (Relationship: Task N:N Tag)

Tag.title: Tag
Tag.description: Represents a reusable tag that can be applied to tasks and knowledge nodes for categorization and filtering.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Tag entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity who created this tag. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Tag)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the tag was created.

KnowledgeNode.title: KnowledgeNode
KnowledgeNode.description: Represents a node in the user's personal knowledge graph, which can be a skill, topic, goal, or note.

id.description: Unique identifier for the KnowledgeNode entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity who owns this knowledge node. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N KnowledgeNode)

title.description: A concise title or name for the knowledge node.

content.description: The detailed content or description for the knowledge node.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the knowledge node was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the knowledge node was last updated.

tagIds.description: References to Tag entities associated with this knowledge node. (Relationship: KnowledgeNode N:N Tag)

referencedGoalId.description: Optional reference to a specific Goal entity if this node represents a goal. (Relationship: KnowledgeNode 1:1 Goal)

referencedSkillId.description: Optional reference to a specific Skill entity if this node represents a skill. (Relationship: KnowledgeNode 1:1 Skill)

KnowledgeEdge.title: KnowledgeEdge
KnowledgeEdge.description: Represents a directed relationship between two KnowledgeNode entities in the user's personal knowledge graph.

id.description: Unique identifier for the KnowledgeEdge entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity who owns this knowledge edge. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N KnowledgeEdge)

sourceNodeId.description: Reference to the source KnowledgeNode entity. (Relationship: KnowledgeNode 1:N KnowledgeEdge)

targetNodeId.description: Reference to the target KnowledgeNode entity. (Relationship: KnowledgeNode 1:N KnowledgeEdge)

relationshipType.description: Describes the nature of the relationship (e.g., "PrerequisiteFor", "RelatedTo", "IsPartOf", "Explains").

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the knowledge edge was created.

Skill.title: Skill
Skill.description: Defines a specific skill concept that users can learn, track, and associate with goals or knowledge.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Skill entity.

name.description: The name of the skill (e.g., "JavaScript", "Public Speaking", "Data Modeling").

description.description: A brief description of what the skill entails.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the skill definition was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the skill definition was last updated.

UserSkill.title: UserSkill
UserSkill.description: Represents a user's proficiency and status regarding a specific skill, forming a join entity between UserProfile and Skill.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserSkill entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N UserSkill)

skillId.description: Reference to the Skill entity. (Relationship: Skill 1:N UserSkill)

level.description: The user's assessed proficiency level for this skill (e.g., 1-5, or a custom scale).

lastAssessedAt.description: Timestamp of the last assessment or update of this skill's level.

isLearning.description: Indicates if the user is currently actively learning or developing this skill.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user's association with this skill was first recorded.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user's skill record was last updated.

LearningRoadmap.title: LearningRoadmap
LearningRoadmap.description: Represents a personalized learning plan generated for a user, outlining steps to achieve a target role or skill set.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LearningRoadmap entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity who owns this roadmap. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N LearningRoadmap)

targetRole.description: The target role or objective for which the roadmap was generated (e.g., "AI Engineer").

timelineMonths.description: The planned duration of the roadmap in months.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when the roadmap was initially generated.

status.description: The current status of the roadmap (e.g., "Generated", "InProgress", "Completed", "Archived").

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the roadmap record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the roadmap record was last updated.

RoadmapStep.title: RoadmapStep
RoadmapStep.description: Represents an individual step or milestone within a LearningRoadmap, often corresponding to a weekly breakdown.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RoadmapStep entity.

roadmapId.description: Reference to the LearningRoadmap entity this step belongs to. (Relationship: LearningRoadmap 1:N RoadmapStep)

title.description: A concise title for the roadmap step (e.g., "Week 1: Foundations of Python").

description.description: A detailed description of the objectives and content for this step.

startDate.description: The planned start date for this roadmap step.

endDate.description: The planned end date for this roadmap step.

order.description: The sequential order of this step within its roadmap.

associatedSkillIds.description: References to Skill entities that this step aims to develop. (Relationship: RoadmapStep N:N Skill)

suggestedTaskDescriptions.description: A list of textual descriptions for suggested daily tasks within this step.

isCompleted.description: Indicates if this roadmap step has been completed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the roadmap step was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the roadmap step was last updated.

UserMetricSnapshot.title: UserMetricSnapshot
UserMetricSnapshot.description: Stores periodic snapshot of aggregated user performance and cognitive metrics for analytics and insights.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserMetricSnapshot entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity this snapshot belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N UserMetricSnapshot)

date.description: The specific date for which these metrics were calculated/recorded.

productivityScore.description: A calculated score reflecting user productivity.

consistencyStreakDays.description: The number of consecutive days of consistent activity.

taskCompletionRate.description: The percentage of tasks completed within the period.

delayRatio.description: The ratio of delayed tasks to total tasks.

burnoutRiskIndicator.description: An indicator score for potential burnout risk.

focusScore.description: A calculated score reflecting user's focus.

learningVelocity.description: A metric indicating the rate of learning progress.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this metric snapshot was recorded.

definition.description: Stores individual user profile information. The document ID ({userId}) must match `request.auth.uid` for secure access. All subsequent user-specific data will be nested under this path.
Personal goals for a user. Each goal document includes `userId` for authorization independence, ensuring only the owning user can access it.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the goal.

params.name: goalId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific goal.

definition.description: Tasks associated with a specific goal, owned by the user. The `userId` from the parent goal is denormalized into each task document for authorization independence, eliminating `get()` calls in rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the task and its parent goal.

params.name: goalId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent goal.

params.name: taskId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific task.

definition.description: User-defined tags for organizing tasks and knowledge nodes. Each tag document includes `userId` for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who created and owns the tag.

params.name: tagId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific tag.

definition.description: Nodes in the user's personal knowledge graph. Each node document includes `userId` for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the knowledge node.

params.name: nodeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific knowledge node.

definition.description: Edges representing relationships between knowledge nodes, owned by the user. Each edge document includes `userId` for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the knowledge edge.

params.name: edgeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific knowledge edge.

definition.description: Globally defined skill concepts. These are public and readable by all authenticated users, providing a central reference for skills across the application. Creation/updates should be restricted (e.g., to an admin role).

params.name: skillId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific skill definition.

definition.description: Tracks a user's proficiency and learning status for a specific skill. Each document includes `userId` for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this skill record.

params.name: userSkillId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user's specific skill tracking record.

definition.description: Personalized learning plans generated for a user. Each roadmap document includes `userId` for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the learning roadmap.

params.name: roadmapId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific learning roadmap.

definition.description: Individual steps within a user's learning roadmap. The `userId` from the parent roadmap is denormalized into each step document for authorization independence, eliminating `get()` calls in rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the roadmap step and its parent roadmap.

params.name: roadmapId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent learning roadmap.

params.name: stepId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific roadmap step.

definition.description: Periodic snapshots of user performance and cognitive metrics for analytics. Each snapshot document includes `userId` for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user to whom the metric snapshot belongs.

params.name: snapshotId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific metric snapshot.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure for OpenMind OS is designed with a strong emphasis on user-centricity, security, and scalability, adhering to the core design principles. All personal user data is organized under a top-level `/users/{userId}` collection, making `request.auth.uid` the primary and most efficient authorization mechanism. This parent-child relationship (User 1:N Goal, Goal 1:N Task, etc.) is consistently applied to ensure clear ownership and simplified security rules.

Authorization Independence is achieved by explicitly including the `userId` field in every document that belongs to a user, even within subcollections. For example, `Task` documents are located at `/users/{userId}/goals/{goalId}/tasks/{taskId}`, and each `Task` document will contain a `userId` field matching the `{userId}` in the path. This denormalization means that security rules for `Task` documents do not need to perform a `get()` operation on the parent `Goal` document to verify ownership; they can simply check `request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId && resource.data.userId == userId` (where `userId` is the path wildcard). This prevents rule complexity, avoids dependencies on parent documents, and supports atomic operations.

QAPs (Query as a Proxy for Security) are fully supported through Structural Segregation. By placing all user-specific data under `/users/{userId}/...` paths, any `list` operation on these collections is automatically constrained by the `request.auth.uid`. A user can only query for their own goals, tasks, knowledge nodes, etc., because the path itself contains their unique identifier. This eliminates the need for complex server-side filtering or inefficient client-side `where()` clauses that can be bypassed by malicious users. The global `skills` collection (`/skills/{skillId}`) is a dedicated top-level collection for public, shared skill definitions, maintaining a homogeneous security posture (globally readable) separate from private user data. This clear separation ensures that security rules are straightforward and easy to debug, as each collection or subcollection inherently defines its access patterns without relying on conditional logic based on document content for fundamental authorization.
